structured_payload_candidate.title: Relief Dampers Passive Building Pressure Control
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Control of Actuated Relief Dampers without Fans
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Relief dampers enabled when supply fan proven ON and any outdoor air damper open; disabled and closed otherwise. Position reset linearly from MinRelief to MaxRelief as MinOAsp resets from MinOA to DesOA.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Supply fan proven ON and any OA damper open
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Enable dampers; set position proportional to MinOAsp
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
b. Relief dampers shall be enabled when the associated supply fan is proven ON and any outdoor air damper is open, and disabled and closed otherwise.
c. Relief -damper position shall be reset linearly from MinRelief to MaxRelief as the minimum outdoor airflow setpoint, MinOAsp, is reset from MinOA to DesOA .

anchor_repair_reason: evidence_quote replaced with verbatim section heading line
judge_reason: Evidence quote only provides section title, not the operational details in summary. Unsupported extraction.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Second-Stage Freeze Protection
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If SAT drops below 3°C (38°F) for 5 minutes, fully close economizer and minimum OA dampers for 1 hour, and set Level 3 alarm. After 1 hour, resume minimum OA ventilation and reenter first-stage freeze protection.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: 1. Close economizer and min OA dampers; 2. Set Level 3 alarm; 3. After 1 hour, resume min OA and revert to first-stage freeze protection
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the supply air temperature drops below 3°C (38°F) for 5 minutes, fully close both the economi zer damper and the minimum outdoor air damper for 1 hour and set a Level 3 alarm noting that minimum ventilation was interrupted. After 1 hour, the unit shall resume minimum outdoor air ventilation and enter the previous stage of freeze protection (see Sec tion 5.18.11.1 ).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Filter Pressure Drop Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Alarm when filter pressure drop exceeds the larger of the alarm limit or 12.5 Pa (0.05”) for 10 minutes while fan speed > 20% of MaxCoolSpeed: Level 4. Alarm limit varies with fan speed x as DP100*(x)^1.4.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Fan speed > 20% MaxCoolSpeed for 10 min and DP > max(alarm limit, 12.5 Pa)
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Filter DP exceeds threshold with fan speed above 20% MaxCoolSpeed for 10 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Filter pressure drop exceeds the larger of the alarm limit or 12.5 Pa (0.05”) for 10 minutes when fan speed  exceeds 20%  of MaxCoolSpeed :  Level 4.  The alarm limit shall vary with fan speed  as follows:
